must_detect.matched_text: Consideration estimated at $185,000,000 cash plus up to 12.5% earn‑out in ORHB common; term sheet signed 2026‑07‑01; definitive agreement targeted 2026‑08‑10, subject to customary MAE

NON‑PUBLIC DRAFT — Reg FD Controlled — Embargo 2026‑08‑15 09:30 ET — Project Larkspur — Orchid Ridge HealthBank, Inc. and Silver Plover Capital LLC
Data Processing & Retention Workflow Note (DPA Addendum) — US CCPA/HIPAA/GLBA for Orchid Ridge HealthBank, Inc. (issuer; listed on AmeriBoard Market) re: proposed combination with Silver Plover Capital LLC
Consideration estimated at $185,000,000 cash plus up to 12.5% earn‑out in ORHB common; term sheet signed 2026‑07‑01; definitive agreement targeted 2026‑08‑10, subject to customary MAE
STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL • selective disclosure under SEC Reg FD: wall‑crossing window 2026‑08‑12, embargo until 2026‑08‑15 09:30 ET; cleansing disclosure draft held by IR
Categories processed: PHI (HIPAA) for care‑management pilots, NPPI under GLBA (account onboarding), employee HR files, and consumer PII reasonably linkable to households (CCPA)
Retention: PHI claim images 6 yrs; NPPI statements 5 yrs; board memo BMR‑042 and investor‑relations Q&A 2 yrs; analyst wall‑cross files 18 mo; delete or de‑identify thereafter
Transfers: only to processors with BAAs/MSAs — HarborStack Systems, Inc. (cloud), NeonLattice Data LLC (analytics) — US‑hosted; dpaconfirm@harborstack.example; sub‑processing changes require 30‑day notice
Security labels: NON‑PUBLIC on SFTP payloads; url: https://ir.orchidridgehb.example/r?doc=DA-DEF%2Fv3&cid=ab12%2F34; acct‑ref C‑7X4‑9_1; EID: R0 1 2 3–9;    N O N ‑ P U B L I C
For clarity, no material adverse effect has occurred as of this note, and ordinary‑course fluctuations are not deemed a MAC for covenant purposes
Public‑source baseline: 2024 CMS fee schedule and ABA banker’s toolkit (public) inform cost models; these items alone are not MNPI
Access controls: need‑to‑know; vendor sandboxes receive masked data only; redress channel for consumers and patients: dsar@orchidridgehb.example or https://privacy.orchidridgehb.example/submit?ref=prj‑larkspur
Incident/FD workflow: if any selective disclosure occurs, notify IR and Legal within 2 hrs; file Form 8‑K or equivalent with the SEC and issue a cleansing disclosure per policy
Processing minima: aggregate analytics only; opt‑out for sale/sharing under CCPA; GLBA NPPI not sold; HIPAA marketing requires prior authorization
